catalogData.name: Mischief
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Accident
powers.raw: Accident (Complex Action, Sustained): Target has Liability on next Agility test and glitches on 1, 2, or 3. Power doesn't break Invisibility. Resist: WIL+AGI
powers.text: Target has Liability on next Agility test and glitches on 1, 2, or 3. Power doesn't break Invisibility. Resist: WIL+AGI

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Cloak
powers.raw: Cloak (Major Action, Sustained): Cast Invisibility on object up to (Force/2)m in size
powers.text: Cast Invisibility on object up to (Force/2)m in size

powers.name: Giggles
powers.raw: Giggles (Complex Action): Cast Influence at Force, but can only make target laugh for 1 Action Phase (Liability on Agility and Drain tests). Power doesn't break Invisibility.
powers.text: Cast Influence at Force, but can only make target laugh for 1 Action Phase (Liability on Agility and Drain tests). Power doesn't break Invisibility.

powers.name: Hide and Seek
powers.raw: Hide and Seek (Major Action): Cast Invisibility on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.
powers.text: Cast Invisibility on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Control Actions or Poltergeist at Force
powers.text: Cast Control Actions or Poltergeist at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Sow Chaos
greatFormPowers.raw: Sow Chaos (No Action): Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
